rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE ALBERTINA LAURENZI REVOCABLE TRUST; THE NANCY LAURENZI TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #13, Report, Fees
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 05/24/2021. 1) Paragraph 1 of the petition refers to the "twelfth" account. 2) Paragraph 4b: What types of utilities are included in the rent? 3) Why is the beneficiary not receiving any monthly allowance authorized by the governing trust? Please identify the beneficiary's other income and resources available for her needs and comfort. 4) Paragraph 10: The statutory recovery cost must be added as this trust is subject to CRC 7.903. 5) Paragraph 11: Please identify the beneficiary's heirs. Notice must be given to them as contingent beneficiaries. 6) Schedule E: The beginning and ending shares of Lord Abbett Short Duration Income Fund appear incorrect. 7) The beneficiary's address listed in the proof of service is different from the address listed in paragraph 11 of the petition.

rulings.Case Title: CONSERVATORSHIP OF ROOSEVELT THOMPSON
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #8, Report, Fees
rulings.Rulings: Appearance required. Issues to include: 1) Unknown receipts of $1,180 and $4,500 were deposited into the estate. Conservator is unable to recall the specific transactions. 2) Inadequate description of cash withdrawals totaling $6,853 were provided, including $4,761 on 7/2/19. Conservator alleges he has tried his best to keep his record organized but was unable to do so due to deteriorating health. 3) Request is made to allow Conservator to file the supplemental accounting after termination of the conservatorship and for distribution of the estate. Remote appearances should be made whenever possible. Please review the 9th amended general order. The following information pertains to appearances by Zoom: WHEN ENTERING "YOUR NAME" ON ZOOM, BOTH THE FIRST AND LAST NAME, AS WELL THE CASE NUMBER, MUST BE INCLUDED. Meeting ID: 875 8017 7925 Password: 722809 To appear by telephone through Zoom, call 1-669-900-6833, and follow the prompts, using the meeting ID and password above. Information regarding appearance by CourtCall can be found in the 9th amended general order.

rulings.Case Title: IN RE: THE GWENN M. BENEDICT TRUST ESTABLISHED BY SUBSTITUTED JUDGMENT ON APRIL 6, 2001
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #6, Report, Fees
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 5/12/2021 Endorsed-filed single sided courtesy copies are required for any papers filed with the court and must be received by Examiner in room 202 at the Superior Court. Examiners will not review any document until after it has been filed and a courtesy copy has been received. [LRSF 2.7, 14.7]. Courtesy copies dropped off without a hearing date or examiner name on the top page or on the envelope, will be processed by the clerks as time allows and may cause delays. Petitioner must submit a hard copy of the proposed order to the Examiner in room 202 at least five (5) court days in advance of the scheduled hearing date, with the scheduled hearing date noted on the face sheet. [LRSF 14.7]. Proposed orders dropped off without a hearing date or examiner name on the top cover page or on the envelope, will be processed by the clerks as time allows and may cause delays. An endorsed-filed single sided hard copy of all documents filed in response to these notes, as well as any other documents required must be received by this Examiner in room 202 no later than 4 pm on 4/26/2021 [LRSF 14.7 B.]

rulings.Case Title: CONSERVATORSHIP OF DONALD M. WILSON
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #2, Report, Fees
rulings.Rulings: Hearing appearance required. Remote appearance by video or telephone should be made whenever possible. Please review the 9th amended general order for more information. To appear by Zoom, go to Zoom.com and click Join Meeting, and use the ID and password below. Meeting ID: 875 8017 7925 Password: 722809 To appear by telephone through Zoom, call 1-669-900-6833 and follow the prompts, using the meeting ID and password above. Parties appearing should check in for the hearing using their full name. Conservatorship Issues 1) Professional fiduciary Daniel Cunningham liquidated conservatee's IRA without court authority. 2) Professional fiduciary Daniel Cunningham paid for trust assets from conservatorship assets without court authority. 3) Professional fiduciary Daniel Cunningham alleges $2,455.00 in payments were made in error and Daniel Cunningham has agreed to reduce his fee request by the payments made in error. There is a duplicate payment to Great Call of $143.99 and Daniel Cunningham will reduce his fees in that amount. 4) Professional fiduciary Daniel Cunningham is requesting $78,778.50 in fees as former conservator $56,869.51 is remaining compensation due after fees on account. 5) Attorney is requesting $64,603.75 in fees and $1,739.66 in costs. 6) Professional fiduciary Daniel Cunningham is requesting re-approve the 3,156.878 shares of Franklin California Tax Free Income Fund Class A.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF NORRIS ROHDE
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition To Distribute Net Proceeds From Sales Of Real Property To Sister State Personal Representative
rulings.Rulings: continued to 5/24/21. issues to be cured by noon on 5/10/21: the petition is not verified as required by the Rules of Court; filing (and proper notice given after filing) of an amendment addressing probate code 12540's requirement that the court find the distribution is in the best interests of the estate or interested persons (not addressed in the petition); the petition seeks distribution of more than 50% of the assets, which is greater than allowed by probate code 11623; new mailed notice is required, as the proof of service filed 4/8/21 shows notice mailed 4/5/21 for hearing on 4/19/21, which is only 14 days notice when 15 days is required.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF LYNN MCKANNAY
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION, Appointment Under IAEA
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 5/26/2021. 1) Petitioner filed a DE-111 as a Supplemental Petition. This is not proper procedure and must be filed as an Amended petition and noticed. See California Rule of Court 7.3]. An amended pleading or an amendment to a pleading requires the same notice of hearing (including publication) as the pleading it amends. [California Rule of Court 7.53]. An endorsed-filed single sided hard copy of all documents filed in response to these notes, as well as any other documents required must be received by this Examiner in room 202 no later than 4 pm on 5/10/2021 [LRSF 14.7 B.]

Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Please review the Court's 9th Amended General Order which took effect on 02/10/2021 for more information.
